key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy, tofu, cow’s milk
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household. Budget is $180 total; try to stay close to the limit. Must-haves include poultry (chicken breast 2 lbs or turkey if cheaper), fresh produce (spinach, cherry tomatoes, avocados), brown rice, olive oil, dairy-free Greek-style yogurt, and unsweetened almond milk. Stock pantry with black beans, chickpeas, medium salsa, and oats. Household items needed: paper towels, dish soap, and kitchen-size trash bags. Preferences: avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging; avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy, tofu, and cow’s milk. For substitution approval, email kesha.williams@example.com. Payment uses household card ending 4821.
